identificationModule.officialTitle: Clinical Study to Evaluate the Tooth Whitening Efficacy of a New NextGen In-office Whitening System

interventions.name: Beaming White
interventions.description: 25%HP gel for in office use only

interventions.name: Philips Zoom Professional Whitening Treatment
interventions.description: Light-Activated Whitening - Contains 25% HP gel for in-office use only

interventions.name: Opalescence Boost PF
interventions.description: Contains 40%HP whitening gel for in-office use only

interventions.name: Soft Manual Toothbrush
interventions.description: Colgate Adult Extra Clean soft-bristle toothbrush

primaryOutcomes.description: The primary outcome variable of this study will be tooth shade whitening improvements via the Vita Extended BleachedGuide 3D-Master (29 tabs).
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Immediately after whitening and 1 week later.
